_comment: Routes that are NOT and CANNOT BE human-navigable from any nav surface. Reviewers rejecting a whitelist PR MUST apply the triage test: 'Can a human user (any persona) gain from seeing this page?' If yes, it does NOT belong here. Every entry's reason MUST begin with one of MACHINE-ONLY / API-HANDLER / UNAUTHENTICATED-FUNNEL. SSOT: unified-trading-pm/codex/06-coding-standards/orphan-audit.md §Whitelist Triage Rule.

entries.reason: MACHINE-ONLY — liveness probe consumed by k8s / Cloud Run health checks; returns JSON, never user-navigated.
UNAUTHENTICATED-FUNNEL — OAuth entry; reached via require-auth middleware redirect, not a declared tile.
UNAUTHENTICATED-FUNNEL — public signup flow; user cannot act until OAuth / invite redirect completes.
UNAUTHENTICATED-FUNNEL — post-signup holding page; reached via OAuth redirect flow before session established.

UNAUTHENTICATED-FUNNEL — first-login cockpit wizard reached via firebase-provider redirect immediately post-auth (plan §9 + §22). Not a declared nav tile because the wizard is intentionally one-shot per user. Wiring of the redirect itself is tracked separately; this entry comes off the whitelist when the redirect lands.
API-HANDLER — Next.js route.ts fetched programmatically by the UI; not a page.
API-HANDLER — Next.js route.ts triggered by download button via fetch; not a page.
API-HANDLER — Next.js route.ts accepting POST uploads from onboarding form; not a page.
API-HANDLER — Next.js route.ts returning onboarding doc inventory for /admin/organizations/[id] Documents panel; fetched via query-string URL so the scanner's path-literal match misses it.
API-HANDLER — Next.js route.ts accepting per-doc admin deletes with a typed-confirm token; fetched from /admin/organizations/[id] Documents panel, never navigated.
API-HANDLER — Next.js route.ts called via fetch from signup flow to send Firebase verification email via Resend; not a page.
API-HANDLER — Next.js route.ts called via fetch from login page forgot-password flow; not a page.
API-HANDLER — Next.js route.ts accepting POST from contact form; not a page.
API-HANDLER — Next.js route.ts called fire-and-forget after questionnaire Firestore write; not a page.
API-HANDLER — Next.js route.ts accepting POST from strategy evaluation form; not a page.
API-HANDLER — Next.js route.ts called after signup wizard completion to send welcome email via Resend; not a page.
API-HANDLER — Next.js route.ts for setting Firebase custom claims from admin panel; not a page.
UNAUTHENTICATED-FUNNEL — Firebase custom action handler; reached via emailed verification link, not a declared nav tile.
UNAUTHENTICATED-FUNNEL — Firebase custom action handler; reached via emailed password-reset link, not a declared nav tile.
API-HANDLER — Next.js route.ts called after strategy evaluation form submit to send confirmation email via Resend; not a page.
API-HANDLER — Next.js route.ts called by /strategy-evaluation/status page to read a submission by magic token; not a page.
API-HANDLER — Next.js route.ts called from /strategy-evaluation form's 'Already submitted? Resend my access link' button; not a page.
API-HANDLER — Next.js route.ts called by the wizard form on every form-state change to mirror the localStorage draft into Firestore for cross-device resume; not a page.
UNAUTHENTICATED-FUNNEL — token-gated submission view; reached only via magic-link email after a successful form submit, not a declared nav tile.
